title: Grants; ability to contract
doc_html:
§2454.  Grants; ability to contract

The council may accept grants, gifts, and bequests and enter into contracts to carry out the purposes of this Chapter.

Added by Acts 1980, No. 751, §2.

§2454.  Grants; ability to contract
The council may accept grants, gifts, and bequests and enter into contracts to carry out the purposes of this Chapter.
Added by Acts 1980, No. 751, §2.
